subcodes.title: Words to some Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-18
subcodes.first_line: I praise God that I am with you. Such an assembly would be utterly impossible to hold through worldly power and outward means
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد میکنم خدا را که با شما هستم باسباب ظاهره و قوه ملکی چنین مجلسی فراهم نمودن
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @second birth, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @praise of Western values; culture, @unity in diversity, @blind imitation [taqlid], @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
